description: Pbla (P3), the constitutive sigma-70 beta-lactamase (bla/AmpR) promoter from pBR322; 70 bp, minus strand of J01749.

references.title: Nucleotide sequence of the ampicillin resistance gene of Escherichia coli plasmid pBR322
references.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences USA

references.authors: Brosius J, Cate RL, Perlmutter AP
references.title: Precise location of two promoters for the beta-lactamase gene of pBR322. S1 mapping of ribonucleic acid isolated from Escherichia coli or synthesized in vitro
Characterization of the beta-lactamase promoter of pBR322
Two improved promoter sequences for the beta-lactamase expression arising from a single base-pair substitution

label: Pbla
note: Constitutive sigma-70 promoter (P3) of the beta-lactamase gene (bla / AmpR) from pBR322; 70 bp taken from the minus strand of J01749. Drives bla transcription in the direction opposite the conventional pBR322 numbering. Suboptimal -35/-10 hexamers give weak-to-moderate constitutive strength.

sigma-70 -35 hexamer (TTCAAA); matches consensus TTGACA at 4/6 positions. DNase I footprinting (Russell & Bennett 1981) and S1 mapping (Brosius et al. 1982) experimentally place this element. Spacer to -10 = 17 bp (optimal).

sigma-70 -10 (Pribnow) hexamer (GACAAT); the canonical 6-mer of the GACAATA 7-mer assigned by Russell & Bennett (1981) DNase I footprinting / in vitro transcription and confirmed by Brosius et al. (1982) S1 mapping. Spacer from -35 = 17 bp.

provenance.sequence_source: pBR322 (J01749), bla (AmpR) promoter region, minus strand, 100% identity over 70 bp

functional_claims.label: Constitutive sigma-70 promoter; no known cognate regulator.

source.quote: Characterization of the beta-lactamase promoter of pBR322
source.section: DNase I footprinting / in vitro transcription

functional_claims.label: Weak-to-moderate constitutive strength; both -35 (TTCAAA) and -10 (GACAAT) hexamers are suboptimal vs the sigma-70 consensus.

source.quote: a single GC->AT substitution creates an improved -35/-10 match, indicating the wild-type elements are suboptimal

functional_claims.label: Transcription start site mapped ~35 bp upstream of the bla ATG, defining promoter P3.

value.note: ~35 bp from ATG; P3 of the two bla promoters

source.quote: Precise location of two promoters for the beta-lactamase gene of pBR322. S1 mapping of RNA
